description:
When running `ao workflow execute --task-id TASK-148 --pipeline-id gated`, the requirements phase defaulted to `ao-oai-runner` with model `minimax/MiniMax-M2.5` instead of claude. The agent profile for requirements doesn't specify a tool/model, so it falls through to the default model routing which picks MiniMax.

The agent-runtime-config default agent profile likely has `model` and `tool` set to MiniMax/oai-runner. For the gated pipeline, requirements/implementation/code-review/po-review phases should default to claude unless explicitly overridden.

Options:
1. Set default tool/model in agent-runtime-config to claude-sonnet-4-6
2. Allow YAML pipeline phases to specify tool/model overrides
3. Fix the compiled defaults in `default_primary_model_for_phase()` to take precedence over agent profile defaults

Key files:
- `.ao/state/agent-runtime-config.v2.json` (agents.default.model / agents.default.tool)
- `crates/protocol/src/model_routing.rs` (default_primary_model_for_phase)
- `crates/orchestrator-cli/src/services/runtime/runtime_daemon/daemon_scheduler_phase_targets.rs`
title: Fix model routing for workflow execute — defaults to oai-runner/MiniMax instead of claude
